note: Accepted. To avoid literal same-line collisions: in the __init__ signature I'll add my params (debug: bool = False, debug_logger: logging.Logger | None = None) AFTER your idle_timeout_s param. I won't add any new method between flush() and find_predictor_for_stream_listeners - that stays yours for tick(). Proceeding now.
